nasb.text: You shall send away both male and female; you shall send them outside the camp so that they will not defile their camp where I dwell in their midst.”

esv.text: You shall put out both male and female, putting them outside the camp, that they may not defile their camp, in the midst of which I dwell.”

cnv.text: 無論男女，你們都要送出去；你們要把他們送出營外，免得他們玷污自己的營，這營就是我居住的。”

ccb.text: 无论男女，都送到营外，免得他们玷污了营地，因为我住在其中。”
